audit: B — fallbacks, approximations, caps, silent degradation in World Model V2
default_runtime_trace: swm/facade.py:forecast(architecture='world_model_v2') -> unified_runtime.simulate_world (structural_mode default 'ensemble') -> structural_runtime.simulate_structural_ensemble -> per-model _condition_and_pilot_model -> phase8_pipeline.prepare_persistence_run/run_persistence_slice -> materialize.operators_from_plan (SWM_ACTOR_POLICY default 'hybrid_relevant_actor_policy'; SWM_CONSEQUENCES default 'generated_actor_mediated_world') -> rollout/temporal_runtime -> qualitative_actor.QualitativeActorPolicyRuntime.decide + generated_world control plane -> EventTimeContract/OutcomeContract.project

env_gates.SWM_ACTOR_POLICY: default hybrid_relevant_actor_policy (LLM cognition Tier1/2, NUMERIC Tier3)
env_gates.SWM_LLM_ACTORS: unset default; 'off' forces numeric_policy (explicit ablation); also legacy persona scope knob (default 'relevant')
env_gates.SWM_CONSEQUENCES: default generated_actor_mediated_world (causal-boundary compile; legacy scalar pathway writes are explicit benchmark mode)
env_gates.SWM_ACTOR_LLM_BUDGET: default 240 LLM calls per run across ALL branches/actors/decisions
env_gates.packs_cwd_dependent: experiments/replay_vault_v3/family_hazard_pack.json + family_survival_pack.json + experiments/actor_decision_calibration.json exist in repo but are RELATIVE paths — running from any other cwd silently downgrades to broad LEAN_BETA priors / unvalidated label; intention_hr_pack.json and coupling_pack.json do NOT exist, so documented priors always serve

findings.current_approximation: Tier-3 ('routine') actors are routed to the numeric ActorPolicyModel: softmax over broad-prior utility components, fixed policy-family mixture weights, TemperatureCalibrator(1.0), sampled action executes into the world
findings.replaces_causal_process: the actor's actual deliberation (persistent qualitative LLM cognition) for every actor the RelevantActorSelector did not score Tier 1/2 — including any actor with 'no causal signal in the compiled plan'
findings.required_replacement: route every invoked human actor through qualitative LLM cognition; if compute forbids it, record temporally_truncated/actor_not_simulated for that decision instead of substituting a fitted policy
findings.regression_test: test_no_numeric_decision_in_default_run — assert actor_policy_report.actors_routed_numerically == [] (or every numeric entry is an explicit truncation record, never an executed decision)

findings.current_approximation: LLM decision failed/unparseable after retries+fallback model families -> super().decide() numeric policy DECIDES AND EXECUTES; marked 'numeric_fallback' in provenance and excluded from the counted action distribution, but the branch and its downstream consequences stay in the terminal distribution
findings.replaces_causal_process: a Tier-1/2 consequential actor's decision at this event — replaced by broad-prior utility softmax
findings.required_replacement: on total LLM failure mark the branch temporally_truncated/decision_unsimulated (same contract as budget exhaustion in ProductionActorPolicyOperator.run) and surface truncated share; never let a numeric decision execute for a routed actor
findings.regression_test: test_llm_failure_truncates_not_substitutes — stub llm to always raise; assert no actor_action StateDelta with decision_source numeric_fallback and branch stats.temporally_truncated is True

findings.current_approximation: engine.budget_left() False at decide() entry -> numeric_reason='llm_budget_exhausted' -> numeric policy decides. Operator call sites (ProductionActorPolicyOperator.run, GeneratedActorInvocationOperator.run) gate BEFORE decide and record honest truncation, but direct callers (individual_reaction.simulate_individual_reaction L231, decide_and_execute_particles, any future seam) hit this numeric substitution
findings.replaces_causal_process: the actor's decision when the per-run 240-call budget (SWM_ACTOR_LLM_BUDGET) is exhausted
findings.required_replacement: delete this branch: budget exhaustion inside decide() must return the same temporal-truncation record the operators produce; no code path may convert budget exhaustion into a numeric decision
findings.regression_test: test_budget_exhaustion_never_numeric — set SWM_ACTOR_LLM_BUDGET=1, run a 2-decision scenario; assert zero posteriors with provenance.qualitative.reason=='llm_budget_exhausted' and truncation.actors_not_processed non-empty

findings.current_approximation: budget hits zero between the operator gate and the call (or during retries/revision round) -> returns None -> caller labels it 'llm_failed_or_unparseable' and falls to numeric — budget exhaustion mislabeled as parse failure
findings.replaces_causal_process: same as above; additionally corrupts the fallback-reason taxonomy used for auditing
findings.required_replacement: return a typed sentinel (BudgetExhausted) distinct from parse failure; caller converts it to temporal truncation
findings.regression_test: test_budget_race_labelled_truncation — exhaust budget inside the retry loop; assert reason recorded is budget truncation, not llm_failed_or_unparseable

findings.current_approximation: len(posterior_worlds)>1 -> 'multi_particle_bridge_is_numeric': the Phase-3->4 bridge pools particles into ONE numeric decision (ActorPolicyModel over all views)
findings.replaces_causal_process: branch-specific qualitative decisions whenever any caller passes multiple worlds (decide_and_execute_particles, phase8 materialize_and_decide, validation harnesses); the canonical terminal path always passes [world] so this is not on the default rollout
findings.required_replacement: either per-particle qualitative decisions on the bridge or hard-error when a qualitative-routed actor is asked for a pooled decision
findings.regression_test: test_multiworld_bridge_rejected_for_tier1 — call decide with 2 worlds for a Tier-1 actor; assert raise (or per-branch qualitative calls), never a pooled numeric posterior

findings.current_approximation: the numeric engine itself: random_utility/multinomial_logit/quantal_response/satisficing family scores over UtilityInference components with broad-pack coefficients (success mean 1.0, stance mean 1.5, others 0), fixed family weights {random_utility .3, quantal_response .2, satisficing .2, risk_sensitive .15, limited_depth .15}, precision 0.7, softmax, posterior.sample(rng)

findings.current_approximation: hypothesis-generation LLM call fails or parses empty -> THREE GENERIC PERSONALITY TEMPLATES (steady_confident / private_doubt / depleted_delegating) become the actor's hidden-state hypothesis set for the whole run (recorded in revision_log/assumptions)

findings.current_approximation: branches whose decision fell to the numeric policy are EXCLUDED from the counted reaction distribution and the remaining branches renormalize (n_excluded_numeric_fallbacks reported); the numeric decision still executed in that branch's world

findings.replaces_causal_process: failed structural models' probability mass silently redistributes to survivors in the headline number (per-model distributions and robust range are present in structural_ensemble block)
findings.required_replacement: acceptable given labels; consider withholding the mixture (nulling raw_probability) when incomplete=true so the robust range is the only headline
findings.regression_test: test_incomplete_ensemble_headline — kill one model's pilot; assert simulation_status=completed_with_degradation and limitation names the failed model

findings.current_approximation: pilot = max(8, 20% of full budget); non-promotion ONLY on pilot-indistinguishability from a stronger similar model (spread<=0.02, n>=12); generation ceiling 8 (12 max-capacity) with structurally_underidentified marker
findings.replaces_causal_process: none — conservative promotion; ceilings marked
findings.required_replacement: none (honest)
findings.regression_test: existing ensemble tests cover

findings.current_approximation: channel not in temporal model -> 'unmodeled_channel_broad_band' duration draw; actor without attention profile -> 'unmodeled_attention_broad_band'; TIMING_REGIMES wide lognormal bands for qualitative labels
findings.replaces_causal_process: actual delivery/attention timing when the temporal compiler produced no channel/profile (e.g. temporal_compilation_failed is a recorded LOUD degradation, then every delivery uses broad bands)
findings.required_replacement: honest labeled bands; ensure temporal_model errors surface in limitations (currently lineage only)
findings.regression_test: test_temporal_compile_failure_limitation — fail compile_temporal_model; assert result.limitations mentions degraded temporal model

findings.current_approximation: all behavior->state->hazard coupling constants (pathway_step .04, endogenous split .60, contested suppression .50, attrition, persistence survival .75/.85 etc.) are documented unfitted priors sampled per branch
findings.replaces_causal_process: the magnitude of every action's effect on causal processes is a prior draw, not fitted
findings.required_replacement: honest (sampled, labeled, clamped); fit when corpus exists
findings.regression_test: test_coupling_source_reported — assert coupling_source=documented_priors_unfitted in event_time report

findings.production_reachability: default_on (pack cwd-relative; falls to 'unvalidated' label otherwise)
findings.current_approximation: counted qualitative action distributions calibrated by ONE reference-class temperature (0.9, fit on a 50-case corpus with a training-contamination caveat) for every actor/role/domain; without the pack the raw distribution ships labeled unvalidated
findings.replaces_causal_process: none (post-aggregation external calibration — the permitted design); flags: single temperature for all actors
findings.required_replacement: keep; note cwd dependence of CALIBRATION_PACK
findings.regression_test: test_calibration_level_reported — assert calibration_level in artifact

findings.current_approximation: HONEST TRUNCATION EXEMPLAR: budget exhausted before invoking -> temporally_truncated:actor_llm_budget_exhausted delta, actor recorded in actors_not_processed, NO numeric decision invented — this is the contract the audit wants everywhere
findings.replaces_causal_process: nothing — the pending decision is recorded unsimulated
findings.required_replacement: none — extend this pattern to qualitative_actor.py L918/L947 and engine.decide L758
findings.regression_test: existing (keep as pinned behavior)

findings.current_approximation: actor_policy_report lists routed/numeric actors + per-reason fallback counts (good); but the terminal distribution is built from ALL branches including numeric-decided ones while actor_decision_distributions excludes them — the headline probability and the reported actor distributions are computed over different branch sets with no cross-reference
findings.replaces_causal_process: consumers cannot tell what fraction of terminal mass flowed through numeric decisions
findings.required_replacement: add terminal_mass_from_numeric_decisions share to actor_policy_report
findings.regression_test: test_numeric_terminal_share_reported — force 30% numeric fallback; assert the share appears on the result

findings.current_approximation: generated_report counts actors_invoked/reconsidered/declined but there is NO record of declared entities that were NEVER invoked across a whole run (omitted actors); an entity outside every frontier/decision event silently never acts
findings.replaces_causal_process: the causal contribution of declared-but-never-reached actors is silently zero
findings.required_replacement: per-run census: entities declared vs entities that ever decided/were invoked; record 'entities_never_invoked' with reasons (no frontier path vs budget truncation)
findings.regression_test: test_never_invoked_entities_reported — plan with an isolated entity; assert the census lists it

findings.current_approximation: fidelity_expand / temporal compile / event-time conversion failures are caught, error string recorded in lineage, and the run CONTINUES — for event-time failure the removed-resolver rewiring does not happen, so the broad-prior GenericOutcomeOperator silently becomes the binary answer path again (recorded only as lineage.event_time.error)
findings.replaces_causal_process: first-passage causal resolution silently reverts to the terminal coin on conversion exceptions
findings.required_replacement: conversion failure on a binary/when question should cap support to exploratory and surface a limitation ('resolver path active due to conversion failure'), not just a lineage note
findings.regression_test: test_conversion_failure_visible — raise inside convert_binary_to_event_time; assert result.limitations names the resolver fallback and support is capped

findings.current_approximation: actor recall = top-8 episodic memories by recency/salience (probabilistic, never perfect recall — by design Part 8)
findings.replaces_causal_process: deliberate bounded-memory model — honest
findings.required_replacement: none (by design); document k
findings.regression_test: existing phase8 tests

findings.production_reachability: default_on (multi-hypothesis single-model path; hypothesis_lean via uncertainty_meta; ensemble path uses separate models instead)
findings.current_approximation: competing structural hypotheses shift the posterior/target rate by fixed multiplicative +-0.2/0.4 keyed to an LLM-proposed qualitative lean
findings.replaces_causal_process: structural disagreement expressed as a numeric shift on the terminal rate rather than different simulated causal structure (the ensemble path fixes this properly)
findings.required_replacement: confine to the single_structural_model ablation; ensemble already supersedes
findings.regression_test: test_lean_shift_absent_in_ensemble — assert hypothesis_lean unset on ensemble-path worlds

findings.current_approximation: belief shift = fixed rule (credibility x trust x salience, entrenchment damping, clamp [0.02,0.98]) — numeric belief dynamics outside the actor's mind
findings.replaces_causal_process: belief revision of actors on information exposure (qualitative actors revise their own beliefs in actor_state_update; this operator writes numeric belief fields the NUMERIC policy consumes)
findings.required_replacement: scope to numeric-policy baselines; qualitative actors' numeric belief fields should come only from their own view projections
findings.regression_test: test_belief_operator_not_on_qualitative_state — assert qualitative latent state untouched by belief_update deltas

findings.current_approximation: max_requirements_retrieved=8 (VoI-ranked), max_claim_docs=16 LLM claim extractions per question
findings.replaces_causal_process: evidence breadth (scope cap, VoI-prioritized — acceptable)
findings.required_replacement: none; keep VoI ranking
